verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the immediate next action, "tell me... Where the app lives"; B opens with meta, "prompt got dismissed".
verdict.decisiveness: A slightly: it promises "a recommendation for your stack"; B makes the user choose among "email+password, social/OAuth... managed service".
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: "since it's not under `/private/tmp` or `/tmp`"; A: none.
verdict.actionability: A: gives a 7-part implementation plan from "Data model" to "test checklist"; B only asks 3 setup questions.
